column1: # Strain2bScan vs StrainScan, per-sample profiling on the C. acnes 64-genome panel.
# CORRECT enzyme table (Fast2bRAD-M tag lengths) + single-strand scan + canonical hash.
# Strain2bScan on 5 simulated strain-mixture mocks; StrainScan unchanged (unaffected). 16-core arm64 macOS.
# Strain2bScan ~8x faster and ~11x lighter per sample. Markers are 1x (single-strand, correct
# lengths) and ~3.5x fewer than the earlier both-strand workaround, so this is faster AND lighter
# than that while matching Fast2bRAD-M tags exactly.
